### SOME_COMPANY — Software Engineer II (Full-Stack)
*2022 – Present*

- Built the user onboarding A/B testing framework from scratch, enabling the growth team to run 3 simultaneous experiments per sprint; onboarding completion rate rose from 54% to 71% within two months of adoption.
- Shipped a React component library (42 components) shared across 3 product squads, reducing new feature UI scaffolding time from ~3 days to ~4 hours per squad per sprint.
- Reduced API error rate from 1.4% to 0.2% by migrating the legacy Express.js authentication middleware to a dedicated auth service with structured retry logic and circuit-breaking.

### BLUE_LABS — Junior Software Engineer
*2020 – 2022*

- Implemented a CSV-based bulk import pipeline for enterprise customers, cutting onboarding time for large accounts from 5 business days to same-day.
- Migrated 4 critical REST endpoints from synchronous DB writes to an async queue-backed pattern, reducing average response time from 620ms to 140ms under load.
